summary: Konekt B2B Platform Iteration 338 - Feedback Widget, Vendor-Category Assignments, Order Splitting. All backend APIs (19/20 tests passed - 95%) and frontend features verified working.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 200 without authentication. Should require admin auth for security.

action_items: Consider adding authentication to GET /api/admin/vendor-assignments endpoint for security
critical_code_review_comments: Feedback routes properly serialize MongoDB _id to string id
Vendor assignment routes use upsert pattern correctly for vendor_id uniqueness
Order splitting logic handles unassigned categories gracefully
seed_data_creation: Created test feedback entries and vendor assignments during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Feedback Widget visible on marketplace (bottom-left 'Help & Feedback' button), opens panel with category selection and description, submits successfully with 'Thank you' confirmation. 2) Feedback Inbox at /admin/feedback-inbox shows stats cards (New, In Progress, Resolved, Total) and feedback list with filters. 3) Vendor Assignments at /admin/vendor-assignments shows assignment list with 'Assign Vendor' button, form with vendor select and category toggles. 4) Operations sidebar has 6 items including 'Vendor Assignments'. 5) Order split endpoint correctly groups items by vendor and returns unassigned items.

feedback_widget.details: Floating 'Help & Feedback' button visible on marketplace (bottom-left). Opens panel with 5 category options (Bug/Error, Payment Issue, Order Issue, Feature Request, General Feedback), description textarea, and Submit button. Shows 'Thank you!' confirmation on success.

feedback_backend.details: POST /api/feedback creates entry (public). GET /api/feedback lists all. GET /api/feedback/stats returns counts. PATCH /api/feedback/{id} updates status.

feedback_inbox_page.details: Admin page at /admin/feedback-inbox shows stats cards (New=2, In Progress=0, Resolved=1, Total=3), filter buttons, and feedback list with category/status badges.

vendor_assignments_backend.details: POST creates/updates assignment (upsert by vendor_id). GET lists active assignments. GET by-category returns vendors for category. POST split-order groups items by vendor capability.

vendor_assignments_page.details: Admin page at /admin/vendor-assignments shows 'Assign Vendor' button, assignment list with vendor name, type badge, preferred badge, and category tags.

operations_sidebar.details: Operations section contains 6 items: Orders & Fulfillment, Site Visits, Deliveries, Purchase Orders, Supply Review, Vendor Assignments
